{{CargoRelic
|name=Coral Fossil
|class_id=20495
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The coral is a marine multicellular invertebrate that could secrete calcium carbonate and form a hard skeleton in its body. With a tough body, it was often mistaken for a rock. As its body comprises many small individual corals, the surface of the stone-like outer shell was filled with holes of different sizes. Those with trypophobia, you've been warned.
|fame=29
|art=17
|fth=16
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail ATK +40<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +1%
|ss2=Snail ATK +60<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +2%
|ss3=Snail ATK +80<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +3%
|ss4=Snail ATK +80<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +3%
|ss7=Snail ATK +80<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
